title: Baghdad Thirudan
subTitle: An orphaned prince lives life as a thief after the death of his parents. Later, he seeks to avenge the king and queen by reclaiming his rightful place on the throne.

title: Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of catchy, popular and entertaining songs by various artists and bands from around the world, is played back-to-back.
